title: Huawei OptiXstar EG8145B7N-50, GPON ONT Gateway, WiFi 7
description: The Huawei OptiXstar EG8145B7N-50 is a GPON ONT device with support for Wi-Fi 7 . It offers: 1x SC/APC uplink connector, 1x 2.5 GE and 3x GE ports, 1x POTS port, and 1x USB port. Support for Wi-Fi 7 (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz with speeds of 688 Mb/s and 2882 Mb/s), including advanced technologies such as MU-MIMO, WPA3, and Beamforming. Package Contents Device Power adapter 12V / 1.5 A 1x SC/APC uplink connector, 1x 2.5 GE and 3x GE ports, 1x POTS port, and 1x USB port Support for Wi-Fi 7 (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz with speeds of 688 Mb/s and 2882 Mb/s), including advanced technologies such as MU-MIMO, WPA3, and Beamforming Device Power adapter 12V / 1.5 A
specsSearch: Wireless features MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2880 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Security WPA3 AES 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Fixed Fixed antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] 7 Optics Transmission speed 2.488 / 1.244 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 / 1490 Transfer type GPON Polishing type APC Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 27 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000/2500Mbps + (3) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power via connector/terminal 12V / 1,5A
